# Research - 2026-06-11

Focus: **all** (CLI, providers, tools, MCP, commands, hooks, skills, plugins, agents, permissions)

> 1-day delta on 2026-06-10. **Engineering throughput remains 0** -
> 9 enhancement issues open, 0 closed since `35bb61bc` (2026-06-06).
> Upstream landed 4 mechanically transferable fixes in 24h: kilocode
> #10478 hosted shell-timeout cap, cline #11408 `windowsHide` sweep,
> opencode #31752 MCP `notifications/message`, opencode #31618 MCP
> catalog-pagination timeout. Aider/claude-code/continuedev: 0
> functional commits. Repo-rotation to `sst/opencode` (recommended
> 06-10) is validated - opencode shipped 8 functional commits today.

## Executive Summary

- **kilocode #10478 -> Item #1 (~3h)**: `bash.ts:101` and
  `shell.ts:104` accept user-supplied `timeout` with no env-imposed
  ceiling. Hosted runners need `KILO_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MAX_MS` clamp
  with optional `_MESSAGE`. Kilocode merged 5 files / +327 -19 today.
- **cline #11408 -> Item #2 (~2h)**: only `bash.ts:116` and
  `shell.ts:122` set `windowsHide: true`. Missing on
  `background-process.ts:85`, `repo-clone.ts:45`, three `grep.ts` rg
  spawns (76, 255, 334), three `clipboard.ts` `execFile`s (98, 223,
  286), and `githubPr.ts:93`. Windows users see flicker on every
  TUI git poll, rg, clipboard, and bg-process call.
- **opencode #31752 -> Item #3 (~3h)**: `grep -n
  "setNotificationHandler\|notifications/message" src/mcp/` returns 0
  hits. MCP server logs (parse errors, deprecation, rate-limit) are
  silently dropped. Opencode's diff was `+30 -2`.
- **opencode #31618 -> Item #4 (~2h)**: `client.ts:76` calls
  `client.listTools(cursor)` inside `listAllTools` with NO `signal`.
  `callTool` correctly enforces timeouts (`client.ts:421-423`); the
  pagination loop is unguarded and runs BEFORE `status: 'connected'`.
  With `MAX_PAGES = 100` worst case is 100x default timeout hang on
  CLI startup.
- **Backlog**: 9 enhancement issues open, 0 PRs landed in 24h. 06-10
  planning hand-off (#748/#749/#750/#751) brought open count 5 -> 9.
  Engineering-agent now 5 cycles into stall.
- **No-action signals**: cline #11372 ("singleton Cline Hub")
  presupposes a hub daemon we don't have. opencode #31837/#31822
  (connector auth, v2 session API) are platform-level. kilocode
  #11094 transcript virtualization is VS-Code-only (not Ink).

## Detailed Findings

### Closed since 2026-06-10

- None. Last close was commit `35bb61bc` on 2026-06-06.

### Verified-still-open (already filed)

#699, #703, #710, #720, #721, #748, #749, #750, #751.

### New gaps this cycle

#### 1. `KILO_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MAX_MS` cap on bash/shell timeouts (Category: tool - small, ~3h)

- **What**: At `bash.ts:101` and `shell.ts:104` clamp the resolved
  `timeout` against `process.env.KILO_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MAX_MS`. When
  the cap fires, set `timedOut = true` and append optional
  `KILO_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MAX_MS_MESSAGE` (default `"Command exceeded
  hosted runtime cap of <N>ms"`) to `stderr`. Extract a shared
  `src/tool/shell/timeoutPolicy.ts`. Tests
  (`__tests__/timeout-policy.test.ts`): (a) cap honoured when env
  set, (b) `params.timeout` lower than cap wins, (c) cap message
  only when env set, (d) NaN/negative env ignored.
- **Why**: Our `auto-implement.yml` and other Actions runners share
  minutes; one rogue tool call can pin a runner for an unbounded
  `params.timeout`. Also feeds DoD for #710 (TimeoutError adoption).
- **Source**: Kilo-Org/kilocode#10478, commit `5bc8df8` (2026-06-11).
- **Category**: tool. **Size**: small (~3h).

#### 2. `windowsHide: true` on every spawn / execFile (Category: tool - small, ~2h)

- **What**: Add `windowsHide: true` to spawn options at
  `background-process.ts:85`, `repo-clone.ts:45`, `grep.ts:76`,
  `grep.ts:255`, `grep.ts:334`. Pass `windowsHide: true` to every
  `execFileAsync` call in `utils/clipboard.ts` (98, 223, 286) and
  `utils/githubPr.ts:93`. Add a regression test (`tests/lint/
  windows-hide.test.ts`) that greps source for spawn/execFile call
  sites without an adjacent `windowsHide` token.
- **Why**: `bash`/`shell` are fixed; users still get console-window
  flicker on every git status, rg, clipboard, MCP stdio child, and
  bg process. Cline's diff touched 19 files. Lint test prevents
  regressions on new callsites.
- **Source**: cline/cline#11408, commit `7d11935` (2026-06-10).
- **Category**: tool. **Size**: small (~2h).

#### 3. MCP `notifications/message` handling (Category: mcp - small, ~3h)

- **What**: After `await connection.client.connect(...)` near
  `client.ts:223`, call `setNotificationHandler(
  LoggingMessageNotificationSchema, ...)` to forward
  `notifications/message` into `src/utils/logger.ts`. Map MCP
  severities `debug|info|notice|warning|error|critical|alert|
  emergency` to `logger.debug/info/warn/error`. Preserve `data`,
  `logger` (server-side name), and `level` fields. Register
  unconditionally - do NOT gate on tool capability. Tests at
  `src/mcp/__tests__/notifications.test.ts` using a stub client that
  emits `loggingMessage`: assert level mapping and data forwarding.
- **Why**: MCP servers emit verbose stderr-style notifications for
  parse errors and deprecation warnings; today we drop them. Users
  see "MCP tool call timed out" without the upstream log line.
- **Source**: anomalyco/opencode#31752, commit `07b983e` (2026-06-10).
- **Category**: mcp. **Size**: small (~3h).

#### 4. MCP catalog pagination timeout (Category: mcp - small, ~2h)

- **What**: Refactor `listAllTools` (`client.ts:68-83`) to accept
  `signal: AbortSignal` and pass `{ signal }` as third arg to
  `client.listTools(...)`. In `connect()` near line 145, create a
  controller with the same `getTimeoutForServer(name)` budget
  `callTool` uses; abort if pagination doesn't resolve in time. On
  timeout mark connection `status: 'error'` with message `"Tool
  catalog timed out after <N>ms after <P> pages"`. Tests at
  `src/mcp/__tests__/catalog-timeout.test.ts`: (a) hung `listTools`
  aborts, (b) successful paginated response completes, (c)
  per-server config timeout overrides default.
- **Why**: `callTool` correctly enforces timeouts; `listAllTools`
  runs BEFORE `status: 'connected'` with no abort plumbing. Hung
  servers can hang `initializeAll()` indefinitely. With `MAX_PAGES
  = 100` worst case is 100x default timeout.
- **Source**: anomalyco/opencode#31618, commit `f43b0d3` (2026-06-10).
- **Category**: mcp. **Size**: small (~2h).

## Actionable Recommendations

1. **Engineering-agent stall is now 5 cycles deep** (06-06 -> 06-11).
   Have `daily-merge-prs` file a status issue if
   `auto-implement-issues-closed-7d == 0` for 3 consecutive days.
2. **Smallest-PR ladder**: #750 (`.ods`, ~2h) -> Item #4 (MCP
   catalog timeout, ~2h) -> Item #2 (`windowsHide`, ~2h) -> #748
   (update-notifier, ~3h). Each is < 100 LOC + focused test file.
3. **Item #1 unblocks #710**: the cap path is the cleanest place to
   produce the new `TimeoutError`; schedule them in sequence to
   avoid merge churn.
4. **Reference-repo rotation confirmed**: `sst/opencode` shipped 2/4
   actionable items today. Drop continuedev (week 9 dryness), add
   `sst/opencode`. Update `agent1-research-system.md` repo list in a
   separate `docs(ci)` PR.
